name: Wayback Image Restorer
author: George Nicolaou

sections.description: Find missing or broken images on your WordPress site and restore them from the Internet Archive Wayback Machine.
sections.changelog:
1.0.2

  • Fix automatic updates for this repository layout by serving a dedicated metadata file and packaged plugin ZIP.

1.0.1

  • Try legacy .png, .jpg, and .jpeg archive URLs when a missing image is now stored as .webp.

1.0.0

  • Initial release.

upgrade_notice: This update fixes the custom GitHub-backed updater so newer releases appear correctly in WordPress.
